name: CVR Partners, LP
description: CVR Partners, LP is a growth-oriented limited partnership that specializes in the production, marketing, and distribution of nitrogen-based fertilizer products. Formed by CVR Energy, Inc., the company operates manufacturing facilities in Coffeyville, Kansas, and East Dubuque, Illinois. CVR Partners utilizes advanced technologies to produce ammonia and urea ammonium nitrate (UAN) fertilizers, serving the needs of the agricultural sector while maintaining a strong commitment to safe, environmentally responsible operations and delivering long-term value to its unitholders. The company is headquartered in Sugar Land, Texas, and is organized under the laws of the state of Delaware.
